mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comment ( note_id, user_id, parent_comment_id, content, created_at ) VALUES ( #{noteId}, #{userId}, #{parentCommentId}, #{content}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM comment WHERE note_id = #{noteId} AND is_deleted = 'N' ORDER BY created_at ASC
SELECT * FROM comment WHERE parent_comment_id = #{parentCommentId} AND is_deleted = 'N' ORDER BY created_at ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE comment SET content = #{content}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE comment_id = #{commentId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 'N'
UPDATE comment SET is_deleted = 'Y', deleted_at = NOW() WHERE comment_id = #{commentId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM comment WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 'N' ORDER BY created_at DESC
